description: Fix 6 review issues: cumulative chart units, deleteNode cascade, dual locale state, PSK not cleared on mode switch, portal usage view unreachable, incomplete cascade delete
steps: 1. Fix cumulative chart units in DashboardView.vue: multiply each bps sample by 3 (interval) and divide by 8 (bits to bytes) before accumulating.
2. Fix deleteNode cascade in api.go: wrap in transaction, add node_services/node_usage_snapshots/node_diagnostics cleanup, handle errors properly.
3. Fix dual locale state in i18n.ts: remove local locale ref and setLocale, re-export from shared useI18n composable.
4. Clear PSK on mode switch in NodesView.vue: add watcher or @change to clear configForm.extra_json.psk when mode changes away from PSK.
5. Make Usage view accessible from portal DashboardView.vue: add a link to portal-usage route in the usage card section.
acceptance_criteria: trafficChartData computed multiplies each sample by (3/8) before accumulating
deleteNode uses a transaction and cleans all 6 related tables with proper error handling
i18n.ts re-exports t, locale, setLocale from the shared useI18n composable
PSK is cleared when L2TP switches from ipsec to plain or IKEv2 switches from psk to certificate
Portal dashboard has a link/button that navigates to portal-usage route
npm run build succeeds for admin and portal
